stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning an isothermal layer in the atmosphere is correct?

options.a: Air parcels that are forced to rise through an isothermal layer keep the same temperature.
options.b: An isothermal layer is absolutely stable.
options.c: An isothermal layer is formed when the air in the layer is well mixed by turbulence.
options.d: The vertical temperature gradient lies between the dry and saturated adiabatic lapse rates.
